summary: Summary: Speaker2 begins the conversation expressing sadness and frustration as they prepare to leave, asking Speaker1 to take care of their baby and promising to come back. Speaker1 responds with sadness, agrees to help, asks for letters and promises lots of pictures, revealing longing and frustration. Midway both become overcome with sadness while discussing the hardship of being apart; Speaker1 explicitly voices frustration that it’s unjust they are at war. Speaker2, still sad and frustrated, attempts to make sense of the situation and reassures Speaker1 that they will do whatever it takes and return to a happy life, showing moments of happiness and resolve. The conversation closes with mutual sadness tempered by reassurance and tentative happiness as they reach a mutual understanding of the impending separation.
